definition: A small, transient, non-interactive surface that appears on hover or keyboard focus of a trigger and supplements it with an accessible description. Wired via aria-describedby (it describes; it does not name), never as the sole carrier of essential information, and never holding focusable content. Must satisfy WCAG 1.4.13 — hoverable, persistent, and dismissible.
usage: Delivered by the Tooltip block, composing the Anchor, Surface, and Typography intents. Distinct from a Toggletip.
